question: The chart shows global smartphone market share in 2024. Which statement is correct according to the percentage labels on the chart?

options.A: Huawei has a lower market share than Xiaomi.
options.B: Huawei has the highest market share among the brands shown.
options.C: Apple’s market share is the smallest among the brands shown.
options.D: Samsung and Xiaomi together account for more than half of the market.

explanation: From the labels, Huawei has the highest share (55%). The bars' heights are not proportional to the percentages (they use a separate 'height' value), which can mislead viewers into thinking Huawei is largest when relying on visual comparison.
